name: Socratic Voice System
description: Build Pangram-resistant content generation through Socratic extraction + voice synthesis
objective: Generate V-voice content that passes AI detection (<50% Pangram score) by extracting spoken articulation and arranging (not composing) using voice library patterns
key_decisions: Paragraph-level chunks (3-5 sentences) preserve human token distribution
Tightening factor: 'Would V text this to a friend?'
Voice library sources: LinkedIn corpus (385 posts) + Canon articles

workers.description: Run trial Socratic articulation on Talent-Optionality thesis with V. Extract spoken phrases, synthesize article, test with Pangram. Formalize procedure based on results.

Thoroughly analyze 385 LinkedIn posts to: (1) Define content-type taxonomy based on V's actual patterns, (2) Extract paragraph-level chunks for voice library, (3) Identify characteristic rhythms and transitions.

key_questions: What are V's distinct post types?
What paragraph patterns appear across posts?
What transitions does V use between ideas?
What rhythmic signatures distinguish V's writing?
